idea_summary: cuBLAS bf16->fp32 with tensor core and fp32 accumulation. Primary baseline.
torch.mm pure bf16 (wrong output dtype but fastest).
torch.mm with bf16->fp32 cast before matmul (slow).
First WMMA bf16 kernel draft. 5-way bank conflict (79.56%).
Fix shared memory bank conflicts with padding (+8 bf16 per row). +90.7% gain.
Reduce register pressure (126->64), larger block (512 threads). -31.4%.
Vectorized bf162 loads with __ldg. Complex bounds checking hurts perf. -23.8%.
Double buffering to hide latency. Extra register/smem pressure. -16.8%.
